The '''Three Ellas Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. This route connected the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Sorella]], [[Dorella]], and [[Pernella]], which were all ore mining worlds located in the [[Freeworlds Territory]]. The route was connected to the [[Procopian Shipping Lane]] at the [[Tavya system/Legends|Tavya system]]. A minor hyperlane branched off of the run at Dorella, connecting it to the [[Doris system/Legends|Doris system]]. Like all hyperlanes in the Tapani sector, the hyperlane was difficult to navigate due to space debris which drifted into it.<ref name="LotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Three Ellas Run was first mentioned in ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'', a supplement written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]] and released by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]] for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The route was also mentioned in the ''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]'', which was released at the same time by West End Games, and was also written by Sudlow, this time with [[Eric S. Trautmann]].
